# CredSure — Digital Credential Management
> Issue, manage, and verify blockchain-backed digital certificates and badges at scale. GDPR-compliant, EU-hosted.

## Core pages
- [Platform](https://credsure.io/en/platform): The complete digital credentialing platform — issue, verify, govern.
- [Features](https://credsure.io/en/features): Bulk issuance, blockchain verification, sharing, analytics, API.
- [Solutions](https://credsure.io/en/solutions): Higher education, corporate training, associations, certification bodies, healthcare, manufacturing.
- [Pricing](https://credsure.io/en/pricing): Transparent plans, starting free.
- [Integrations](https://credsure.io/en/integrations): LMS, CRM, productivity, e-commerce connectors.
- [Security](https://credsure.io/en/security): Data protection and compliance posture.
- [GDPR](https://credsure.io/en/gdpr): EU data-protection compliance.

## Resources
- [Blog](https://credsure.io/en/blog)
- [Webinars](https://credsure.io/en/webinars)
- [Guides](https://credsure.io/en/guides)
- [Help Center](https://credsure.io/en/help-center)

## Languages
Available in English (/en/...) and German (/de/... with localized slugs, e.g. /de/preise, /de/plattform).
